title: Content hierarchy — Sub Topic layer (Course → Section → Sub Topic → Lesson)

covers: Startup migration backfills sub_topics for all existing sections (idempotent)
Adding a new section auto-creates a default 'Overview' sub topic
Sub topic CRUD: add, rename, duplicate name rejected (400)
Delete sub topic blocked when lessons exist (400 with clear message)
Reorder sub topics via array of ids
Add lesson requires either video URL or at least one notes attachment
GET /courses/{cid}/lessons/{lid} returns prev/next lesson ids, section/sub_topic context
Student progress % correctly counts total lessons across all sub_topics
Migration is idempotent — re-runs do not re-wrap sub topics

screens_verified: /app/courses/{id} — Curriculum now shows Section → SubTopic → Lesson with collapse/expand at every level
Teacher sees: add sub topic, rename, reorder (up/down), delete, toggle comments (Phase 4 wiring), delete lesson
/app/courses/{cid}/lessons/{lid} — new Lesson Page with prev/next navigation (Phase 3 stub in place; video placeholder awaits Phase 2)

warmup_completed: Phone column shown in Admin Users table (wa.me clickable link)
Phone shown in Admin Teachers listing (wa.me link)
Admin /cleanup-test-users endpoint + 'Cleanup TEST_* users' button (removed 26 stale test users in this session)
next_phase: Phase 2 — Lesson content and playback (Video + PDF/Notes coexist; Google Drive link fix)
